description: Overall LiteLLM dashboard across all apps/key aliases. No app dropdown; panels summarize total spend, tokens, requests, model cost, users, and app-level spend.

spec.rawSql:
WITH
  $__fromTime AS selected_start,
  $__toTime AS selected_end
SELECT
  time,
  if(countIf(period = 'Today') = 0, NULL, maxIf(line_value, period = 'Today')) AS Today,
  if(countIf(period = 'Yesterday') = 0, NULL, maxIf(line_value, period = 'Yesterday')) AS Yesterday,
  if(countIf(period = 'Same Day Last Week') = 0, NULL, maxIf(line_value, period = 'Same Day Last Week')) AS same_day_last_week,
  if(countIf(period = '7-Day Average') = 0, NULL, maxIf(line_value, period = '7-Day Average')) AS Seven_Day_Average
FROM
(
  /* Today running total */
  SELECT
    time,
    'Today' AS period,
    sum(period_spend) OVER (ORDER BY time ASC) AS line_value
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      toStartOfInterval(startTime, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS time,
      sum(spend) AS period_spend
    FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
    WHERE startTime >= selected_start
      AND startTime <= selected_end
    GROUP BY time
  )

  UNION ALL

  /* Previous day running total shifted into selected day */
  SELECT
    time,
    'Yesterday' AS period,
    sum(ifNull(period_spend, 0)) OVER (
      ORDER BY bucket_index ASC
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS line_value
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      b.bucket_index AS bucket_index,
      selected_start + toIntervalMinute(b.bucket_index * 30) AS time,
      s.period_spend AS period_spend
    FROM
    (
      SELECT toInt64(number) AS bucket_index
      FROM numbers(48)
    ) AS b
    LEFT JOIN
    (
      SELECT
        toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', selected_start - INTERVAL 1 DAY, startTime), 30)) AS bucket_index,
        sum(spend) AS period_spend
      FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
      WHERE startTime >= selected_start - INTERVAL 1 DAY
        AND startTime <= selected_end - INTERVAL 1 DAY
      GROUP BY bucket_index
    ) AS s
      ON b.bucket_index = s.bucket_index
    WHERE selected_start + toIntervalMinute(b.bucket_index * 30) <= selected_end
  )

  UNION ALL

  /* Same day last week running total shifted into selected day */
  SELECT
    time,
    'Same Day Last Week' AS period,
    sum(ifNull(period_spend, 0)) OVER (
      ORDER BY bucket_index ASC
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS line_value
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      b.bucket_index AS bucket_index,
      selected_start + toIntervalMinute(b.bucket_index * 30) AS time,
      s.period_spend AS period_spend
    FROM
    (
      SELECT toInt64(number) AS bucket_index
      FROM numbers(48)
    ) AS b
    LEFT JOIN
    (
      SELECT
        toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', selected_start - INTERVAL 7 DAY, startTime), 30)) AS bucket_index,
        sum(spend) AS period_spend
      FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
      WHERE startTime >= selected_start - INTERVAL 7 DAY
        AND startTime <= selected_end - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      GROUP BY bucket_index
    ) AS s
      ON b.bucket_index = s.bucket_index
    WHERE selected_start + toIntervalMinute(b.bucket_index * 30) <= selected_end
  )

  UNION ALL

  /* 7-day average running total */
  SELECT
    time,
    '7-Day Average' AS period,
    avg(running_spend) AS line_value
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      selected_start + toIntervalMinute(b.bucket_index * 30) AS time,
      d.day_offset AS day_offset,
      b.bucket_index AS bucket_index,
      sum(ifNull(s.period_spend, 0)) OVER (
        PARTITION BY d.day_offset
        ORDER BY b.bucket_index ASC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
      ) AS running_spend
    FROM
    (
      SELECT toInt64(number + 1) AS day_offset
      FROM numbers(7)
    ) AS d
    CROSS JOIN
    (
      SELECT toInt64(number) AS bucket_index
      FROM numbers(48)
    ) AS b
    LEFT JOIN
    (
      SELECT
        day_offset,
        bucket_index,
        sum(spend) AS period_spend
      FROM
      (
        SELECT
          startTime,
          spend,
          toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', startTime, selected_start), 1440) + 1) AS day_offset,
          toInt64(
            intDiv(
              dateDiff(
                'minute',
                selected_start - toIntervalDay(toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', startTime, selected_start), 1440) + 1)),
                startTime
              ),
              30
            )
          ) AS bucket_index
        FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
        WHERE startTime >= selected_start - INTERVAL 7 DAY
          AND startTime < selected_start
      )
      WHERE day_offset >= 1
        AND day_offset <= 7
        AND bucket_index >= 0
        AND bucket_index < 48
      GROUP BY day_offset, bucket_index
    ) AS s
      ON d.day_offset = s.day_offset
     AND b.bucket_index = s.bucket_index
    WHERE selected_start + toIntervalMinute(b.bucket_index * 30) <= selected_end
  )
  GROUP BY time
)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

spec.description: Running total spend across all apps compared with yesterday, same day last week, and 7-day average.
spec.title: 📈 Running Spend Comparison — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  key_alias AS app,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND key_alias IS NOT NULL
  AND key_alias != ''
GROUP BY app
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Spend split by app/key alias for the selected time range.
spec.title: 🏢 Spend by App — Today

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Total spend across all apps in the selected time range.
spec.title: 💰 Total Spend — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Total tokens consumed across all apps in the selected time range.
spec.title: 🧮 Tokens Consumed — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  count(*) AS requests
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Total API requests across all apps in the selected time range.
spec.title: 📨 API Requests — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  if(count() = 0, 0, countIf(status = 'failure') / count() * 100) AS error_rate
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime

spec.description: Failure rate across all apps in the selected time range.
spec.title: ⚠️ Error Rate — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  replaceRegexpOne(replaceRegexpOne(model, '^.*/', ''), '^global\\.anthropic\\.', '') AS model_name,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND model IS NOT NULL
  AND model != ''
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Top models by spend across all apps.
spec.title: 💸 Cost by Model — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  end_user,
  sum(spend) AS total_spend
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
  AND end_user IS NOT NULL
  AND end_user != ''
GROUP BY end_user
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: Top users by spend across all apps.
spec.title: 👤 Top Users by Spend — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(startTime, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS time,
  sum(total_tokens) AS tokens
FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
WHERE startTime >= $__fromTime
  AND startTime <= $__toTime
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

spec.description: Token usage trend across all apps.
spec.title: 📊 Tokens Over Time — All Apps

spec.rawSql:
WITH
  $__fromTime AS selected_start,
  $__toTime AS selected_end
SELECT
  time,
  if(countIf(period = 'Today') = 0, NULL, maxIf(period_spend, period = 'Today')) AS Today,
  if(countIf(period = 'Yesterday') = 0, NULL, maxIf(period_spend, period = 'Yesterday')) AS Yesterday,
  if(countIf(period = 'Same Day Last Week') = 0, NULL, maxIf(period_spend, period = 'Same Day Last Week')) AS same_day_last_week,
  if(countIf(period = '7-Day Average') = 0, NULL, maxIf(period_spend, period = '7-Day Average')) AS Seven_Day_Average
FROM
(
  /* Today spend per hour - real data only */
  SELECT
    toStartOfHour(startTime) AS time,
    'Today' AS period,
    sum(spend) AS period_spend
  FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
  WHERE startTime >= selected_start
    AND startTime <= selected_end
  GROUP BY time

  UNION ALL

  /* Yesterday spend per hour, shifted into selected day */
  SELECT
    selected_start + toIntervalHour(bucket_index) AS time,
    'Yesterday' AS period,
    sum(spend) AS period_spend
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', selected_start - INTERVAL 1 DAY, startTime), 60)) AS bucket_index,
      spend
    FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
    WHERE startTime >= selected_start - INTERVAL 1 DAY
      AND startTime <= selected_end - INTERVAL 1 DAY
  )
  GROUP BY time

  UNION ALL

  /* Same day last week spend per hour, shifted into selected day */
  SELECT
    selected_start + toIntervalHour(bucket_index) AS time,
    'Same Day Last Week' AS period,
    sum(spend) AS period_spend
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', selected_start - INTERVAL 7 DAY, startTime), 60)) AS bucket_index,
      spend
    FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
    WHERE startTime >= selected_start - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND startTime <= selected_end - INTERVAL 7 DAY
  )
  GROUP BY time

  UNION ALL

  /* 7-day average spend per hour */
  SELECT
    selected_start + toIntervalHour(bucket_index) AS time,
    '7-Day Average' AS period,
    avg(period_spend) AS period_spend
  FROM
  (
    SELECT
      day_offset,
      bucket_index,
      sum(spend) AS period_spend
    FROM
    (
      SELECT
        spend,
        toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', startTime, selected_start), 1440) + 1) AS day_offset,
        toInt64(
          intDiv(
            dateDiff(
              'minute',
              selected_start - toIntervalDay(toInt64(intDiv(dateDiff('minute', startTime, selected_start), 1440) + 1)),
              startTime
            ),
            60
          )
        ) AS bucket_index
      FROM "litellm_prod"."monitor_spendlogs"
      WHERE startTime >= selected_start - INTERVAL 7 DAY
        AND startTime < selected_start
    )
    WHERE day_offset >= 1
      AND day_offset <= 7
      AND bucket_index >= 0
      AND bucket_index < 24
    GROUP BY day_offset, bucket_index
  )
  GROUP BY bucket_index
)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

spec.description: Hourly spend pattern across all apps. Today only shows actual hourly data; historical comparison lines show full-day patterns.
spec.title: ⏱️ Spend per Hour — All Apps

title: LiteLLM Overall Usage Dashboard
